message:
fix: correct import paths in __tests__/ card test files (#5269)

Test files in web/src/components/cards/__tests__/ had incorrect relative
import paths that assumed they were in the same directory as the
components. Since tests are in a __tests__/ subdirectory, all paths need
an additional ../ level:

- Component imports: './Component' -> '../Component'
- vi.mock/import for CardDataContext, DynamicCardErrorBoundary,
  AlertListItem, NotificationVerifyIndicator, deploy/GitOpsDriftDetailModal
- vi.mock/import for hooks: '../../hooks/' -> '../../../hooks/'
- vi.mock/import for lib: '../../lib/' -> '../../../lib/'
- vi.mock/import for contexts: '../../contexts/' -> '../../../contexts/'
- vi.mock for ui components: '../ui/' -> '../../ui/'

Also adds missing CardEmptyState mock in ArgoCDApplications.test.tsx.

Fixes 17 test files that could not load due to module resolution errors.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
